zh.lifeSummary: 當Caradog ap Iestyn於大約1070年出生在英國威爾斯格拉莫爾根阿凡時，他的父親Iestin Gwrgant32歲，母親Constance Wen Cadwgon7歲。他與Gwladys verch Gruffydd of Dinefwr在英國威爾斯結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和2個女兒的父母。

nameMeanings.name: ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Jewish (eastern Ashkenazic): habitational name from Apt, the Yiddish name of Opatów in Świętokrzyskie Voivodeship, Poland. The placename (in German, Yiddish, and Polish) is from a root meaning ‘abbot’, the place having been named for the local abbey. Compare   Abt  .

variants.name: Abt
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Helmut, Horst, Johann, Kurt.

German and Dutch: from Middle Low German or Middle Dutch abt ‘abbot’, hence a metonymic occupational name for a servant of an abbot or a nickname for someone thought to resemble an abbot in some way. In some instances it may have been a topographic or habitational name referring to a house named with this word.
Jewish (eastern Ashkenazic): variant of   Abt  , a habitational name from Opatów in Poland.

variants.name: Apter
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Avrohom, Bronya, Eliezer, Naftali.
Jewish (Ashkenazic): habitational name for someone from Apt (see   Apt  ).
English: habitational name from Aptor in Marldon, Devon, composed of Old English uppe ‘up, above’ + torr ‘rocky outcrop’.

nameMeanings.name: Caradog
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Respelling of Caradog, an ancient Celtic name apparently derived from the root cār ‘love’. This name was borne by a British chieftain of the 1st century ad in the Latinized form Caractacus, son of Cunobelinos.

en.lifeSummary: When Caradog ap Iestyn was born about 1070, in Afan, Glamorgan, Wales, United Kingdom, his father, Iestin Gwrgant, was 32 and his mother, Constance Wen Cadwgon, was 7. He married Gwladys verch Gruffydd of Dinefwr in Wales, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 2 daughters.

fr.Afan cantref, Glamorganshire, Wales: Afan, Glamorgan, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Caradog ap Iestyn est né environ 1070, à Afan, Glamorgan, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, son père, Iestin Gwrgant, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Constance Wen Cadwgon, avait 7 ans. Il a épousé Gwladys verch Gruffydd of Dinefwr à Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 2 filles.

de.lifeSummary: Als Caradog ap Iestyn um 1070 in Afan, Glamorgan, Wales, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Iestin Gwrgant 32 und seine Mutter Constance Wen Cadwgon 7. Er hat in Wales, United Kingdom Gwladys verch Gruffydd of Dinefwr geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 2 Töchter.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Caradog ap Iestyn è nato il circa 1070 nel Afan, Glamorgan, Galles, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Iestin Gwrgant, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Constance Wen Cadwgon, aveva 7 anni. Lui sposato Gwladys verch Gruffydd of Dinefwr nel Galles, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 2 figlie.

ja.lifeSummary: Caradog ap Iestynが約1070年にイギリスウェールズグラモーガンアファンで生まれた時，父Iestin Gwrgantは32歳，母Constance Wen Cadwgonは7歳であった。イギリスウェールズでGwladys verch Gruffydd of Dinefwrと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Caradog ap Iestyn(이)가 대략 1070년 영국 웨일스 글램르건 아펀에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Iestin Gwrgant(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Constance Wen Cadwgon(은)는 7세였다. 그는 영국 웨일스에서 Gwladys verch Gruffydd of Dinefwr(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Caradog ap Iestyn nasceu aproximadamente 1070, em Afan, Glamorgan, Gales, United Kingdom, seu pai, Iestin Gwrgant, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Constance Wen Cadwgon, tinha 7 anos. Ele casou-se com Gwladys verch Gruffydd of Dinefwr em Gales, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 2 filhas.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Caradog ap Iestyn родился около 1070 г. в местности афань, глэморган, Уэльс, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Iestin Gwrgant было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Constance Wen Cadwgon, 7. Он женился на женщине по имени Gwladys verch Gruffydd of Dinefwr в местности Уэльс, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 2 дочери.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Caradog ap Iestyn nació aproximadamente 1070, en Afan, Glamorgan, Gales, Reino Unido, su papá, Iestin Gwrgant, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Constance Wen Cadwgon, tenía 7 años. Se casó con Gwladys verch Gruffydd of Dinefwr en Gales, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 2 hijas.
